title: alkanna corcyrensis
intro: Alkanna corcyrensis, also known as Alkanet, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of the alkaloid alkannin. The health benefits of Alkanna corcyrensis include relief from skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Alkanet can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used as a natural dye due to its vibrant purple color.
